title: UFOs & Human Experiments: Big Pharma's Horrific Past... (ft. Brigham Buhler)
summary: This interview explores the intersection of healthcare corruption, pharmaceutical industry history, and UFO phenomena. Host Jesse Michels and healthcare entrepreneur Brigham Buhler discuss how the medical establishment was captured by corporate interests starting with the Rockefeller Foundation, the dark history of companies like Bayer and Monsanto, suppressed medical technologies, and potential connections between DNA, consciousness, and extraterrestrial intelligence.

acronyms.definition: US regulatory agency for food and drugs, allegedly set up with Rockefeller Foundation influence
Medical association that became an enforcer of drug-based medicine after the Flexner Report
US intelligence agency involved in MK Ultra and other covert programs
CIA division led by Steven Aldrich focused on behavioral control research
US military research agency that rejected gain of function research proposal as too dangerous
The energy source of cells that can be refueled by red light therapy
DNA amplification technique created by Kary Mullis
Compound discovered from Gila monsters used in weight loss drugs

events.description: Nobel Prize awarded for studies in light therapy for recovery
Abraham Flexner began work on behalf of the Rockefeller Foundation
Flexner Report released with backing from Rockefeller and Carnegie, condemning most American medical schools
Payne Aldrich Act related to Federal Reserve formation
Donald Rumsfeld helped orchestrate the sale of Searle to Monsanto
Roundup introduced to broader market, correlating with rise in autoimmune diseases and cancer
Study described DNA as possessing characteristics of fractal antennas
Modified SARS proposal with spike protein submitted to DARPA and rejected as too dangerous
Bayer acquired Monsanto in multi-billion dollar deal

key_claims.claim: Over half of US medical schools shut down after the Flexner Report, and the rest were brought in line with drug-based treatment
Bayer had deep ties with the Third Reich and tested compounds on Nazi concentration camp prisoners
Bayer knowingly shipped HIV-contaminated hemophilia medications to third world countries in the 1980s
General Shiro Ishii and Unit 731 researchers were granted full immunity by the US in exchange for biological warfare data
The CIA's Scientific Engineering Institute was transitioned to private sector and became SAIC metadata, later sold to Monsanto
Between 2011 and 2019, only 0-2 of 356 blockbuster drugs were innovated by big pharma; the rest came from taxpayer-funded research
Detlev Bronk was on the Majestic 12 committee, did alien autopsies, and was president of both Rockefeller Foundation and Johns Hopkins
Kary Mullis, creator of PCR, had an alien abduction experience
Bob Lazar read in classified documents that aliens view humans as containers, possibly of souls or information
Most modern medical professionals have zero nutritional training
Red light therapy three times a week for five minutes can restore degenerative eyesight according to UK studies
Scientists from Japan and NASA confirmed meteorites contained fundamental building blocks for DNA and RNA
Francis Crick believed DNA was too complex to have emerged by accident and proposed directed panspermia
